name: Grokking-MNIST
architecture: 784 inputs → tanh hidden layer (100 neurons) → dropout → softmax → 10 classes
techniques: Dropout regularisation · Gradient descent · Tanh + Softmax activations · One-hot encoding · MSE loss
results: 97.7% test accuracy on 10,000 unseen images after 20 training iterations (60,000 training images, alpha=0.01, 80% dropout keep rate). Train/test gap of only ~0.3%, indicating the network generalises well rather than memorising the training data.
